title: THE TWIDDLERS - 6 Christmas Wine Gift Bags with Sturdy Rope Handles in Assorted Festive Xmas Designs, Gift Bottle Bags, 1 of Each Design, Festive Xmas Wine Bottle Bag - 35cm x 13cm
features: STURDY AND VERSATILE - Measuring 35 x 13 cm, our bottle bags are crafted for quality and durability. Perfect for safely transporting bottles of wine and giftable beverages.

EFFORTLESS GIFT WRAPPING - Wrapping bottles in gift paper can be tricky, but our festive wine bottle bags offer an elegant solution. They make the process simple and elegant while providing protection for your bottles.

EMBRACE FESTIVE SPIRIT - Set the holiday mood with a glass of wine presented in one of our Christmas wine bottle bags. Whether it's for gifting or personal enjoyment, these bags add a touch of seasonal charm to every sip.

PROTECT AND PRESENT - In addition to style, our wine bottle bags offer practicality. They protect your precious cargo during transport and storage, ensuring your bottles arrive safely and elegantly dressed.

COLOURFUL & STRONG - Our colourful Christmas wine gift bags come in designs of reindeers, Santas, elfs, gingerbread men, penguins & snowmen. They also include strong, robust rope handles to ensure there are no breakages.
